title: RolloutPolicy

id.description: Stable URN identifying this rollout policy (urn:srcos:rollout:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

flagRef.description: URN of the ExperimentFlag this rollout policy controls.

rules.description: Ordered list of rollout rule objects; each specifies a cohort selector and an enabled percentage.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about the rollout strategy.

description: A rule set controlling the incremental rollout of an ExperimentFlag to subjects based on cohort membership, percentage thresholds, or attribute predicates.
